evidence: The paper uses leave-one-feature-out (LOFO) importance on the ensemble, explicitly stating: "A LOFO importance analysis was applied on ENS to identify features most predictive of resistance." This is a permutation-based method, not impurity-based. Feature importance ranking is validated through external testing (80.4% balanced accuracy on held-out CAMDA data) and biological corroboration: identified features (LAC-4 strain, tetracycline/aminoglycoside gene classes) align with established resistance mechanisms documented in the literature.
